name: popover
description: A click-triggered floating panel anchored to a trigger, with ZERO JS. The load-bearing overlay seam (ADR-0012 blueprint R4): show/hide via the native HTML `popover` attribute + `popovertarget` (top-layer, light-dismiss, ARIA wired by the browser); position via CSS Anchor Positioning (anchor-name / position-anchor / position-area + flip-block fallback), no @floating-ui/dom. Panel content is OWNED, server-rendered markup (a Content slot), never a <slot>. Optional `title` + `description` render a PopoverHeader and make it a labelled dialog (role=dialog + aria-labelledby); an `align` axis (start/center/end via data-align + position-area inline span) and a decoupled PopoverAnchor (the popover/anchor sub-partial + `anchorId`) match shadcn. Replaces the <lv-popover> Lit island. Plain HTML + Tailwind + --lv-* tokens, CSP-clean. For server-data-driven content + server-held open-state, see the popover-wire component.
docs: Copies the popover family to your JTE root (lievit/popover.jte + lievit/popover/anchor.jte), reached as @template.lievit.popover(...). Pass a unique `id` (the popovertarget link target), the `trigger` content (label/icon) and the `content` panel body (server-rendered, never a <slot>); set `placement` ("bottom" | "top", flips when cramped), `align` ("start" | "center" | "end"), an optional `title` + `description` (a labelled dialog: role=dialog + aria-labelledby), or `disabled`. To anchor the panel to an element OTHER than the trigger, wrap it in @template.lievit.popover.anchor(anchorId=...) and pass the same `anchorId` to the popover. The browser owns show/hide + Escape/outside-click dismiss + aria-expanded; CSS anchor positioning places the panel. The source is yours: edit freely. For a popover whose content depends on server state (the calendar-filter feed), use the popover-wire component instead.
